col0: United States   (2023) Every year, the United States Social Security's Office of the Chief Actuary publishes a list of the most popular names given at birth for males and females in the U.S. (website ). The 2007 list was released May 9, 2008. The most popular names by year beginning with 1880 are listed for the following: 1880s - 1890s - 1900s - 1910s - 1920s - 1930s - 1940s - 1950s - 1960s - 1970s - 1980s - 1990s - 2000s
